tasks.subject: Task 0: Create feature branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create branch from scme0/feature/share-export-redesign.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git log --oneline -3", "acceptanceCriteria": ["branch exists based on share-export-redesign"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: ThumbnailCache service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persistent on-disk PNG cache.

**Files:** Create `lib/services/thumbnail_cache.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/services/thumbnail_cache.dart"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter analyze lib/services/thumbnail_cache.dart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["store/load/remove/pruneLocal implemented", "no analysis issues"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: PatternThumbnail renderer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render CrossStitchPattern to 160×110 PNG.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/services/pattern_thumbnail.dart"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter analyze lib/services/pattern_thumbnail.dart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generatePatternThumbnail implemented", "no analysis issues"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: RecentItem — thumbnailKey, home-folder suppression
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add thumbnailKey to RecentItem; suppress home folder from recents on mobile.

**Files:** Modify `lib/providers/recent_items_provider.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/providers/recent_items_provider.dart"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter analyze lib/providers/recent_items_provider.dart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["thumbnailKey added", "home folder suppressed", "pruneDeletedFiles implemented"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Thumbnail generation on file open (home screen)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate and cache thumbnail after every file open in home_screen.dart.

**Files:** Modify `lib/screens/home_screen.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/home_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter analyze lib/screens/home_screen.dart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["thumbnail generated on all open paths", "pruneDeletedFiles called on init"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Home screen layout — header, HOME item, mixed recents
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Centered header, mobile HOME item, flat mixed recents with thumbnails.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/home_screen.dart", "lib/screens/home_screen_widgets.dart"], "verifyCommand": "export PATH=\"/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH\" && flutter analyze lib/screens/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["centered header", "HOME item mobile-only", "flat mixed recents", "thumbnails shown"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
